name: AutoSport
painPoints: Closed weekends — but already tech-forward (Tekmetric, online booking)
Growing service area across Boulder County = increasing call volume
Active careers page — may be hiring, suggesting growth strain
strengths: 55 years in business (since 1971) — generational customer base
Maintains the City of Longmont's Zamboni
Donates to Habitat for Humanity ReStore — maintains their van
Ongoing partnership with Longmont OUR Center (food delivery truck)
European vehicle specialty (BMW, Porsche, Audi, Mercedes)
conversationStarters: Heard you maintain the city's Zamboni — that's awesome community service
55 years in Longmont is incredible — three generations of customers
suggestedApproach: Already tech-forward with Tekmetric and online booking — harder sell for basic automation. This is a relationship-building visit. Listen more, pitch less. Ask about scaling challenges as their service area grows. Could be a custom integration or workflow optimization play rather than voice bot.
estimatedOpportunity: Discovery conversation — unclear until you learn their pain points
